description: Persona definitions for Phase 3 strategy synthesis. Each persona gets a tailored lens on the same diagnostic data.

finops_lead.title: FinOps Lead / Practitioner
finops_lead.description: The operational owner of FinOps practice. Needs actionable optimization opportunities, maturity roadmap, and cross-team collaboration tactics.
finops_lead.language_style: Operational and specific. Use FinOps terminology. Reference specific cloud services and tools.
key_questions: Where are the largest optimization opportunities in dollar terms?
Which maturity gaps should be addressed first for maximum impact?
What tooling or automation should be implemented next?
How do we build engineering engagement in cost optimization?

cfo.title: CFO / Finance Director
cfo.description: The financial decision-maker. Needs ROI projections, budget variance analysis, risk exposure, and investment justification for FinOps tooling.
cfo.language_style: Financial and strategic. Use business terms. Focus on ROI, risk, and investment. Avoid deep technical jargon.
key_questions: What is the estimated annual savings opportunity?
What investment in tooling and headcount is required?
What is the risk exposure from current cost governance gaps?
How does our cloud unit economics compare to targets?

engineering_lead.title: VP Engineering / CTO
engineering_lead.description: The technical decision-maker. Needs architecture recommendations, engineering workflow integration, and performance-cost tradeoff guidance.
engineering_lead.language_style: Technical and pragmatic. Reference specific architectural patterns, services, and engineering practices.
key_questions: Which architecture changes deliver the biggest cost-performance improvement?
How do we embed cost awareness into engineering workflows without slowing delivery?
What are the highest-risk technical decisions from a cost perspective?
Where should we invest in automation vs. process improvement?

cloud_architect.title: Cloud Architect
cloud_architect.description: Deep technical focus on cost-optimal architecture patterns and service selection.

procurement_lead.title: Procurement / Vendor Manager
procurement_lead.description: Focus on vendor negotiations, commitment strategies, and market benchmarking.

business_unit_leader.title: Business Unit Leader
business_unit_leader.description: Focus on unit economics, product profitability, and demand-driven cost accountability.

platform_engineer.title: Platform Engineer
platform_engineer.description: Focus on Kubernetes optimization, IaC cost guardrails, and developer self-service.

security_compliance.title: Security & Compliance Officer
security_compliance.description: Focus on compliance cost overhead, audit readiness, and governance automation.

sustainability_lead.title: Sustainability / ESG Lead
sustainability_lead.description: Focus on carbon footprint, green cloud practices, and sustainability reporting.
